description:
# Introduction
BreezeDoc's REST API provides a handful of endpoints which can be used to get information about your account and bookings.  It uses conventional OAuth 2.0 protocol for authentication.

# Authentication
### Personal Access Token
Create a personal access token at https://breezedoc.com/integrations/api.  Once created, it can be used to authenticate requests by passing it in the `Authorization` header.
```
Authorization: Bearer {TOKEN}
```

### OAuth 2.0 Client
If you're building a custom integration to BreezeDoc which requires users to authenticate in order to get access tokens to make API requests on their behalf, you'll need to create an OAuth 2.0 client. This is easy to do from the \"OAuth Apps\" settings page found here https://breezedoc.com/integrations/api

Using the `authorization_code` grant type to authenticate users using OAuth 2.0 to retrieve an access token is fairly conventional, more information on that process can be found here: https://www.oauth.com/oauth2-servers/server-side-apps/authorization-code/


* Authorization URL: https://breezedoc.com/oauth/authorize
* Access Token URL: https://breezedoc.com/oauth/token

# Rate Limiting
The API currently has a rate limit of 60 requests per minute. If you exceed this limit, you will receive a 429 error.

tools.name: documents_get
tools.description: Get a specific document. Required: document. Returns the Document.

tools.name: documents_list
tools.description: Get list of documents. Optional: order_by, direction. Returns the DocumentsListResponse.

tools.name: documents_store
tools.description: Create a new document. Required: title. Optional: recipients. Returns the new Document.

tools.name: documents_recipients_list-document
tools.description: Get recipients for a specific document. Required: document. Optional: order_by, direction, completed. Returns the RecipientsListDocumentResponse.

tools.name: documents_send_document
tools.description: Send a document to its recipients. Required: document, recipients. Returns the new Document.

params.name: recipients
params.description: Array of recipients that must match the number of recipients on the document, provided in ascending order of party.

tools.name: invoices_create
tools.description: Creates a new invoice with line items. Optionally sends the invoice immediately by setting `send: true`. Required: currency, customer_email, description, items, payment_due. Optional: customer_name, footer_note, invoice_number (plus 4 more). Returns the new InvoicesCreateResponse.

params.name: payment_platform_ids
params.description: Array of payment platform UUIDs to enable for this invoice.

params.name: payment_terms
params.description: Optional payment due term label. Clients should still provide the calculated payment_due date.

params.name: send
params.description: If true, immediately sends the invoice to the customer

params.name: title
params.description: Optional invoice title. Omitted or null values use the default title, 'Invoice'.

tools.name: invoices_delete
tools.description: Deletes a draft invoice. Cannot delete invoices that have already been sent. Required: invoice. Returns the InvoicesDeleteResponse. Destructive.

tools.name: invoices_get
tools.description: Get a specific invoice. Required: invoice. Returns the InvoicesGetResponse.

tools.name: invoices_list
tools.description: Retrieves a paginated list of invoices for the authenticated user. Optional: order_by, direction, status. Returns the InvoicesListResponse.

tools.name: invoices_patch
tools.description: Same as PUT - updates an existing invoice. Cannot update invoices with status paid, uncollectible, or void. Required: invoice. Optional: currency, customer_email, customer_name (plus 8 more). Returns the updated InvoicesPatchResponse.

params.name: invoice_number
params.description: Optional invoice reference number. Send null to clear it.

params.name: payment_platform_ids
params.description: Array of payment platform UUIDs to enable for this invoice.

params.name: payment_terms
params.description: Optional payment due term label. Send null to clear it.

tools.name: invoices_update
tools.description: Updates an existing invoice. Cannot update invoices with status: paid, uncollectible, or void. When updating items, the entire items array is replaced. Required: invoice. Optional: currency, customer_email, customer_name (plus 8 more). Returns the updated InvoicesUpdateResponse.

params.name: invoice_number
params.description: Optional invoice reference number. Send null to clear it.

params.name: payment_platform_ids
params.description: Array of payment platform UUIDs to enable for this invoice.

params.name: payment_terms
params.description: Optional payment due term label. Send null to clear it.

tools.name: invoices_send_invoice
tools.description: Sends (or re-sends) an invoice to the customer via email. Cannot send invoices with status: paid, uncollectible, or void. Required: invoice. Returns the new SendInvoiceResponse.

tools.name: me_get-current-user
tools.description: Get current user information. Returns the User.

tools.name: recipients_list
tools.description: Get list of recipients. Optional: order_by, direction. Returns the RecipientsListResponse.

tools.name: teams_documents_list-team
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all documents sent by any member of a given team. This exposes an existing data relationship. Use Case: Enables a team lead or agency owner to build a custom dashboard to monitor their team's signing activities and document statuses. Required: team. Optional: order_by, direction, completed. Returns the DocumentsListTeamResponse.

tools.name: teams_templates_list-team
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all templates shared with a specific team. Use Case: Allows an organization to programmatically audit their team's available templates to ensure brand and legal compliance. Required: team. Optional: order_by, direction. Returns the TemplatesListTeamResponse.

tools.name: templates_get
tools.description: Get a specific template. Required: template. Returns the Template.

tools.name: templates_list
tools.description: Get list of templates. Returns the TemplatesListResponse.

tools.name: templates_create-document_from-template
tools.description: Create a new document from a template. Required: template. Returns the new Document.
